test-case.description: omits PredictionSource for PSReadLine older than 2.2

test-case.description: applies startup actions immediately in a ready non-psmux host

test-case.description: registers deferred startup actions when PSReadLine is not ready yet

test-case.description: passes PSReadLine option settings through the startup helper

test-case.description: reuses a single OnIdle subscription for multiple startup actions

test-case.description: returns $false when TERM_PROGRAM is not set

test-case.description: is idempotent across repeated profile loads

test-case.description: is idempotent across repeated sources

test-case.description: record creates state file with sha256 matching content

test-case.description: record upserts existing entry by path (no duplicates)
test-case.name: secret-deploy-state.ps1.record upserts existing entry by path (no duplicates)

test-case.description: record preserves entries for other paths

test-case.description: record on missing file is best-effort (exit 0, state untouched)

test-case.description: record with relative path is best-effort skip
test-case.name: secret-deploy-state.ps1.record with relative path is best-effort skip

test-case.description: record with too few args exits 2
test-case.name: secret-deploy-state.ps1.record with too few args exits 2

test-case.description: unknown subcommand exits 2
test-case.name: secret-deploy-state.ps1.unknown subcommand exits 2

test-case.description: exits 2 when manifest file is missing

test-case.description: exits 2 when manifest is invalid JSON
test-case.name: secret-status.ps1.exits 2 when manifest is invalid JSON

test-case.description: exits 0 when no deploy targets configured

test-case.name: secret-status.ps1.summary mode prints one-line counts

test-case.description: json mode emits parseable JSON
test-case.name: secret-status.ps1.json mode emits parseable JSON

test-case.description: secret file present with correct mode is OK
test-case.name: secret-status.ps1.secret file present with correct mode is OK

test-case.description: secret file with wrong mode is WARN
test-case.name: secret-status.ps1.secret file with wrong mode is WARN

test-case.description: secret file missing is MISSING
test-case.name: secret-status.ps1.secret file missing is MISSING

test-case.description: gpg without fingerprint is UNKNOWN
test-case.name: secret-status.ps1.gpg without fingerprint is UNKNOWN

test-case.description: env file UNKNOWN when ghq root unresolved

test-case.description: env file warns when filename not in .gitignore

test-case.description: env file OK when gitignore lists filename
test-case.name: secret-status.ps1.env file OK when gitignore lists filename

test-case.description: secret file with sha mismatch is promoted to DRIFT

test-case.description: secret file with matching sha stays OK

test-case.description: WARN takes precedence over content drift

test-case.description: SECRET_DEPLOY_STATE env override is honored

test-case.description: Set-DotfilesOpenSSHDefaultShell creates key and sets registry values
test-case.name: set-openssh-default-shell.Set-DotfilesOpenSSHDefaultShell creates key and sets registry values

test-case.description: Set-DotfilesOpenSSHDefaultShell skips key creation when it exists
test-case.name: set-openssh-default-shell.Set-DotfilesOpenSSHDefaultShell skips key creation when it exists

test-case.description: Reset-DotfilesOpenSSHDefaultShell removes registry values
test-case.name: set-openssh-default-shell.Reset-DotfilesOpenSSHDefaultShell removes registry values

test-case.description: Reset-DotfilesOpenSSHDefaultShell does nothing when key is absent
test-case.name: set-openssh-default-shell.Reset-DotfilesOpenSSHDefaultShell does nothing when key is absent

test-case.description: no signing config emits no signing blocks
test-case.name: signing-resolve.git/config.tmpl.no signing config emits no signing blocks

test-case.description: GPG-only renders legacy GPG signing blocks
test-case.name: signing-resolve.git/config.tmpl.GPG-only renders legacy GPG signing blocks

test-case.description: SSH-only signing_fallback emits ssh format and absolute path key
test-case.name: signing-resolve.git/config.tmpl.SSH-only signing_fallback emits ssh format and absolute path key

test-case.description: GPG fpr + signing_fallback keeps GPG primary, adds SSH aliases
test-case.name: signing-resolve.git/config.tmpl.GPG fpr + signing_fallback keeps GPG primary, adds SSH aliases

test-case.description: explicit signing_format=ssh forces SSH primary
test-case.name: signing-resolve.git/config.tmpl.explicit signing_format=ssh forces SSH primary

test-case.description: legacy primary_signing field is rejected with rename hint
test-case.name: signing-resolve.git/config.tmpl.legacy primary_signing field is rejected with rename hint

test-case.description: multiple signing_fallback keys fail
test-case.name: signing-resolve.git/config.tmpl.multiple signing_fallback keys fail

test-case.description: signing_format=ssh without a fallback key fails
test-case.name: signing-resolve.git/config.tmpl.signing_format=ssh without a fallback key fails

test-case.description: signing_profiles referencing unknown profile fails
test-case.name: signing-resolve.git/config.tmpl.signing_profiles referencing unknown profile fails

test-case.description: GPG profile + signing_profiles keeps GPG primary, adds SSH aliases
test-case.name: signing-resolve.generate-git-profiles.ps1.tmpl.GPG profile + signing_profiles keeps GPG primary, adds SSH aliases

test-case.description: SSH-only profile (no GPG signingkey) emits ssh format + aliases
test-case.name: signing-resolve.generate-git-profiles.ps1.tmpl.SSH-only profile (no GPG signingkey) emits ssh format + aliases

test-case.description: GPG-only profile preserves legacy block (no aliases)
test-case.name: signing-resolve.generate-git-profiles.ps1.tmpl.GPG-only profile preserves legacy block (no aliases)

test-case.description: Test-DotfilesAdminElevation returns false for non-elevated session
test-case.name: sync-openssh-authorized-keys.Test-DotfilesAdminElevation returns false for non-elevated session

test-case.description: Get-DotfilesAuthorizedKeysSource uses the default per-user path
test-case.name: sync-openssh-authorized-keys.Get-DotfilesAuthorizedKeysSource uses the default per-user path

test-case.description: Sync-DotfilesAdministratorsAuthorizedKeys copies the file and resets ACLs
test-case.name: sync-openssh-authorized-keys.Sync-DotfilesAdministratorsAuthorizedKeys copies the file and resets ACLs

test-case.description: Sync-DotfilesAdministratorsAuthorizedKeys throws when the source file is missing
test-case.name: sync-openssh-authorized-keys.Sync-DotfilesAdministratorsAuthorizedKeys throws when the source file is missing

test-case.description: configures zellij web bind, port, sharing, and localhost https toggle
test-case.name: zellij web assets.configures zellij web bind, port, sharing, and localhost https toggle

test-case.description: uses non-trimming template syntax for variable assignments near web_client
test-case.name: zellij web assets.uses non-trimming template syntax for variable assignments near web_client

test-case.description: exposes simplified_ui as a configurable template option
test-case.name: zellij web assets.exposes simplified_ui as a configurable template option

test-case.description: exposes web_client font and cursor settings as configurable template options
test-case.name: zellij web assets.exposes web_client font and cursor settings as configurable template options

test-case.description: documents simplified_ui and web_client settings in the chezmoi config template
test-case.name: zellij web assets.documents simplified_ui and web_client settings in the chezmoi config template

test-case.description: keeps certificate and key comment blocks on their own template lines
test-case.name: zellij web assets.keeps certificate and key comment blocks on their own template lines

test-case.description: documents tailscale publication knobs in the chezmoi config template
test-case.name: zellij web assets.documents tailscale publication knobs in the chezmoi config template

test-case.description: ignores platform-specific zellij artifacts on unsupported platforms
test-case.name: zellij web assets.ignores platform-specific zellij artifacts on unsupported platforms

test-case.description: provides a Unix ensure wrapper with foreground support
test-case.name: zellij web assets.provides a Unix ensure wrapper with foreground support

test-case.description: defines a Linux systemd user service for zellij web
test-case.name: zellij web assets.defines a Linux systemd user service for zellij web

test-case.description: defines a macOS LaunchAgent for zellij web
test-case.name: zellij web assets.defines a macOS LaunchAgent for zellij web

test-case.description: hashes the Windows wrapper from the chezmoi source template path
test-case.name: zellij web assets.hashes the Windows wrapper from the chezmoi source template path

test-case.description: uses systemctl on Linux and launchctl on macOS in the Unix registration script
test-case.name: zellij web assets.uses systemctl on Linux and launchctl on macOS in the Unix registration script
